subcodes.first_line: The upheavals in Iran follow one upon another and have far-reaching consequences; the loved ones must conduct themselves with the utmost composure, steadfastness and dignity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انقلابات در ایران متتابع و عقبه دارد احبّا باید در نهایت سکون و قرار و وقار سلوک و حرکت نمایند
subcodes.subjects: @power of faith; power of the spirit, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
